item.title: Introducing CSS Grid - The Future of Web Layout 🎨
item.description: What is CSS Grid and why is it important?

item.title: CSS Properties Hierarchy
item.description: :root { --border-radius: 5px; } .element { /* css custom properties */ --var--example: 1; ​ /* position */ position: absolute; inset: 0; /* top, right, bottom, left */ z-index: 1;

item.title: You can use express tags… TODAY!
item.description: HTML6 is coming, we know it very well, 'cause we're strongly waiting for features like described here.
